summary: Verified three P0 bug fixes in Balance Sheet for iteration 94. All three bugs are FIXED and working correctly. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All calculations verified via UI screenshots - Balance Sheet balances, Party Summary format correct, no JS errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Bug Fix 1 (Diesel payment): backend/routes/fy_summary.py lines 204-215 now queries ledger nikasi for diesel payments and uses max(diesel_accounts_payment, ledger_nikasi) to get correct paid amount

Bug Fix 2 (Party summary format): backend/routes/cashbook.py lines 580-590 returns {parties: [], summary: {total_parties, settled_count, pending_count, total_outstanding}} matching PartySummaryTab.jsx line 78 access pattern
Bug Fix 3 (Agent jama reconciliation): backend/routes/fy_summary.py lines 479-486 auto-corrects stale agent jama ledger entries when balance sheet loads
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: kms_year=2025-2026, Lokesh Fuels diesel pump, Gokul mandi (cutting_rate=0), Barsana (cutting_rate=10), truck OD15A1234
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three Balance Sheet bugs confirmed fixed. Diesel Lokesh Fuels: paid=17900 via ledger nikasi, closing=0 (not in Sundry Creditors). Party Summary: returns {parties, summary} format - no 'Cannot read total_parties' error. Agent jama: Gokul (cutting_rate=0) total=4000 (correct), Barsana (cutting_rate=10) total=4200 (correct). Balance sheet balances at Rs 11,68,450.

bug_1_diesel_payment_reflection.description: Diesel payment not reflecting in Balance Sheet when paid via ledger nikasi
bug_1_diesel_payment_reflection.root_cause: Original code only checked diesel_accounts.payment, missing ledger nikasi entries
bug_1_diesel_payment_reflection.fix_applied: Uses max(diesel_accounts_payment, ledger_nikasi) - Lines 204-215 in fy_summary.py
bug_1_diesel_payment_reflection.verification: Lokesh Fuels: total_diesel=17900, total_paid=17900, closing_balance=0.00 (not in Sundry Creditors)

bug_2_party_summary_format.description: GET /api/cash-book/party-summary returned flat array instead of {parties, summary} object
bug_2_party_summary_format.root_cause: Desktop cashbook.js party-summary returned wrong format - Frontend expected partySummary.summary.total_parties
bug_2_party_summary_format.verification: Party Summary tab shows Total Parties: 25, Settled: 16, Pending: 9 - No JS error

bug_3_agent_jama_reconciliation.description: Stale agent jama amounts from old buggy cutting_rate calculation persisted in ledger
bug_3_agent_jama_reconciliation.root_cause: Previous cutting_rate bug created ledger entries with wrong amounts - not auto-corrected
bug_3_agent_jama_reconciliation.fix_applied: Balance sheet load auto-corrects stale agent jama ledger entries - Lines 479-486

balance_sheet_verification.sundry_creditors_diesel_excluded: Lokesh Fuels not in Sundry Creditors (balance=0)
